mapper.select: SELECT f.menu_id FROM om_user_menu_favorite_r f WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.disp_seq ASC, f.menu_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_user_menu_favorite_r (user_id, menu_id, disp_seq) VALUES (#{userId}, #{menuId}, #{dispSeq})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM om_user_menu_favorite_r f WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM om_user_m u WHERE u.user_id = f.user_id AND COALESCE(u.is_deleted, false) = false AND COALESCE(u.user_info ->> 'auth_group', '') = #{authGroupCd} )
AND TRUE
AND f.menu_id NOT IN
#{mid}
